definition.en: All action does have an electromagnetic reality, which is usually not perceived by the physical senses.
definition.zh: 所有行动确实具有电磁实相，这通常不被肉体感官所感知。

definition.en: Thoughts and emotions form, of their own electromagnetic reality, vitalized physical products called atoms and molecules.
definition.zh: 思想和情感，凭借其自身的电磁实相，形成了被称为原子和分子的活化物质产物。

definition.en: No physical matter is without this electromagnetic reality, and no thought exists which does not exist within this reality.
definition.zh: 没有物质不具备此电磁实相，也没有思想不存在于此实相之内。

definition.en: Exterior reality is a materialization of inner electromagnetic reality.
definition.zh: 外在实相是内在电磁实相的物质化。

definition.en: Mental acts have an electromagnetic reality which directly affects the inner self, which directly forms the constantly changing nature of the inner self.
definition.zh: 心灵行为具有一种电磁实相，它直接影响内在自我，直接形成内在自我不断变化的本质。

explanation:
电磁实相是赛斯提出的一个核心概念，指思想和情感本身具有真实的电磁结构。每个念头都是一个电磁系统，其质量极轻（最多3-6盎司），由电性强度构成。这些电磁能量单元（EE units）是物质世界的基础——原子和分子正是由思想和情感的电磁实相所催生的物理产物。

个体所有经历都以电磁编码形式存储在细胞中，一次电脉冲就能代表一种情感体验。这些电磁系统形成每个人的电磁身份，存在于肉体之中，却不依赖于物理场域。它们决定了个人能接收或排斥哪些经验，就像调频收音机一样，每个人只能接收到特定电磁波段范围内的信息。

梦境、思想乃至心灵感应，都是个体不断向外投射的电磁实相。这些投射具有真实的化学和电磁属性，

quotes.text: The electromagnetic reality within the human organism has considerable mass, but the entire physical weight amounts to 3 to 6 ounces at the very most. Again, the mass is composed of electrical intensities. I have told you that all experience is basically psychological, and that it is held in coded form within the cells. One electrical pulsation can represent an emotional experience. The importance of the experience to the individual will be responsible for the intensity with which it is recorded.
quotes.translation: 人类有机体内的电磁实相具有相当的质量，但整个物理重量最多只有3到6盎司。再次强调，这种质量由电性强度构成。我曾告诉过你，所有经验本质上都是心理性的，并以编码形式储存在细胞中。一次电性脉动可以代表一种情感经验。该经验对个体的重要性将决定其被记录的强度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: All such projections have an electromagnetic and chemical reality that has its origin within the field of the given personality. This projection of energy is one of the main characteristics of your kind. Dreams and dream images are then projected by the individual in sleep, and also in the waking state, although on a subconscious basis. So are thoughts constantly sent outward, and other projections which we have not yet discussed. Therefore as the individual sends out these projections, so does he receive the projections of others. As you know, telepathy operates constantly beneath the dictates of the ego, and so is your intellectual climate formed.
quotes.translation: 所有这些投射都具有电磁与化学的实相，其源头存在于特定人格的场域内。这种能量投射是你这类存在的主要特征之一。梦境与梦意象由个体在睡眠中投射，在清醒状态下也会进行——尽管是在潜意识层面。思想同样不断向外发送，还有我们尚未讨论的其他投射。因此，当个体向外发送这些投射时，也会接收他人的投射。如你所知，心灵感应持续在自我指令之下运作，你们的知性气候由此形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I also think that if asked Seth would point out that since the concept of quantum mechanics is based upon the idea that everything we "know"--matter, energy, our sensual information--is made up of quanta, or the interactions of insubstantial fields that in turn, and quite paradoxically, produce very active subatomic packets or particles, then quantum mechanics is at least analogous with his statements that basically the universe is composed of consciousness itself. But I think that the continuum of consciousness, or All That Is, contains not only the phenomena of quantum mechanics, but also Seth's nonphysical EE (electromagnetic energy) units, and his CU's (or units of consciousness). In those terms, then, quantum mechanics is a theory that doesn't penetrate deeply enough into basic reality, even if physicists these days are basing their unified field theories upon quantum thinking. (These theories are themselves quite incomplete, since at this time they incorporate only three of the four basic interactions in nature: electromagnetism, and the strong and weak nuclear forces. So far, gravitation remains outside all attempts at integration.)
quotes.translation: 我也认为，若问赛斯，他会指出：既然量子力学概念基于"我们所'知'的一切——物质、能量、感官信息——都由量子构成，或由非实质场域的相互作用（这些场域反而悖论性地产生活跃的亚原子包或粒子）构成"这一观念，那么量子力学至少与他的陈述（宇宙本质上由意识本身构成）具有类比性。但我认为，意识的连续体（或一切万有）不仅包含量子力学现象，也包含赛斯的非物理EE（电磁能量）单元及其CU（意识单元）。依此而论，量子力学是一种未能深入触及基本实相的理论——即便当今物理学家正将统一场论建立在量子思维之上。（这些理论本身相当不完整，因为目前仅整合了自然界四种基本相互作用中的三种：电磁力、强核力与弱核力。迄今为止，引力仍未被纳入任何整合尝试。）
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I don't really think we can conceive of anything to be truly "alien," though, so I use the word here only to lead into the next of Seth's larger concepts that I want to mention: that of probable realities, or probabilities, as Jane and I usually say. Not only does Seth stress the constant psychic motion of reincarnational and counterpart selves upon this earth we know--but he also tells us that each of those selves can move into other or parallel realities. I quote him from Session 681 in Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality:
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: Thoughts, as you know, contain their own electromagnetic reality. This means that each thought is an electromagnetic system in fact and not just in theory. Such a system is the basis for your physical system and these are highly valid. Theoretically only, with drugs it would be possible to be lost within an idea, caught in its electromagnetic reality, and forced to follow the ramifications and developments of the idea in various guises. The value fulfillment system would be changed. There would be development within that system, but you would be lost to your own system.
quotes.translation: 思想，如你所知，本身就包含其电磁实相。这意味着每个思想实际上都是一个电磁系统，而不仅仅是理论上的。这样的系统是你物质系统的基础，并且这些系统高度有效。理论上，借助药物，人可能迷失在一个想法中，被困在其电磁实相里，被迫追随该想法以各种伪装形式产生的分支与发展。价值完成系统会被改变。在那个系统内会有发展，但你会迷失于你自己的系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: All of an individual's experiences, even those of which he is not aware on a conscious basis, therefore are part of the electromagnetic reality that forms this particular individual's electromagnetic identity. It exists within the physical matter of the organism during existence within the physical system. While the experiences which form this framework and compose this individual's identity are obtained through his interaction with the physical system, his electromagnetic identity is not dependent upon the physical field.
quotes.translation: 因此，个体所有的经验，甚至那些他意识层面上并未察觉的经验，都是构成这个特定个体电磁身份的那部分电磁实相。在物理系统内的生存期间，它存在于有机体的物质之中。虽然构成这个框架并组成这个个体身份的经验是通过他与物理系统的互动获得的，但他的电磁身份并不依赖于物理场域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now these same sort of emotional systems operate under all conditions, and they regulate the kinds of experience to which an individual is susceptible or open, and they close out from his awareness those experiences which he has already decided he will not accept. Again, the emotional attitudes have their own electromagnetic reality. This field or system will therefore attract certain experiences, close out others, allow others to come so close and no closer, as is the case with Marleno and our sessions.
quotes.translation: 现在，这些相同类型的情感系统在所有条件下运作，它们调节着个体容易接受或开放的经验类型，并将他已经决定不接受的那些经验从他的意识中排除。再次强调，情感态度有其自身的电磁实相。因此，这个场域或系统会吸引某些经验，排除其他经验，允许另一些经验靠近到一定程度但不再更近，就像马勒诺和我们课程的情况一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The Emotional impact behind them determines their strength. They are passed on telepathically. You recall however that individuals receive in certain electromagnetic patterns, or pattern ranges, far better than they do in others. Some individuals therefore will simply not telepathically receive the dominating reality assumptions, but will be tuned to different ranges, highly unsatisfactory to them. It becomes quickly apparent that their view of reality is entirely different from their neighbors.
quotes.translation: 它们背后的情感冲击决定了它们的强度。它们以心电感应方式传递。然而你记得，个体接收某些电磁模式或模式范围的能力远胜于其他模式。因此有些个体根本不会以心电感应方式接收主流现实假设，而是调频到截然不同的范围，这令他们深感不满。很快便会发现，他们对现实的看法与邻人全然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now. It is not likely that I will be heard by anyone for some time in the way that Philip heard me speak. Again, the condition simply happened to be favorable. I have told you that all action is psychic action, but the terms used make little difference. All action does have an electromagnetic reality, which is usually not perceived by the physical senses.
quotes.translation: 现在。在相当一段时间内，不太可能有人像菲利普听见我说话那样听见我。再次强调，这不过是条件恰好有利。我曾告诉你们，所有行动都是心灵行动，但所用术语并无差别。所有行动确实具有电磁实相，这通常不被肉体感官所感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: For a psychic communication to take place the communication must fall within the particular range of electromagnetic reality that can be picked up by the receiver, and by that particular level of the receiver's self that is able to translate it into meaningful terms. If, that is, you want any kind of proof. Otherwise the communication is simply received and acted upon automatically without leaving a trace. It merely becomes part of a new action, giving no evidence of its source.
quotes.translation: 要使心灵沟通发生，该沟通必须落在接收者能捕捉的特定电磁实相范围内，且必须符合接收者自我中能将之转化为有意义术语的特定层次。也就是说，如果你想要任何形式的证据。否则，该沟通只是被自动接收并执行，不留痕迹。它仅仅成为新行动的一部分，不显露其来源的任何证据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Physically then you perceive an approximation of an inner event. The inner event basically is not physical. (Pause.) Now, as simply as I can put this, thoughts and emotions form, of their own electromagnetic reality, vitalized physical products called atoms and molecules. This is basically what I told you in our early analogy with the mazes and the wires.
quotes.translation: 因此从物质层面来说，你所感知的是内在事件的一种近似。内在事件本质上并非物质性的。（停顿。）现在，我尽可能简单地说明：思想和情感凭借其自身的电磁实相，形成了被称为原子与分子的活化物质产物。这基本上就是我早期用迷宫与电线的比喻向你们阐述的内容。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In such interrelationships, the steps or identities are each immeasurably enriched by the added perception of the others. As mentioned earlier, thoughts, containing their own electromagnetic reality, have form whether or not you perceive it. With each thought, then, you send out from yourself shapes and images that can be quite legitimate realities to those within the system of reality into which they are propelled.
quotes.translation: 在这种相互关联中，每个步骤或身份都因其他存在的感知而获得难以估量的丰富。如前所述，思想本身包含其自身的电磁实相，无论你是否感知到它，它都具有形态。因此，每一个思想都会从你自身向外投射出形状与影像，这些对于它们被推入的实相系统内的存在而言，可能成为完全真实的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. Regard the inner senses in connection with the nature of action and electromagnetic reality, for the perceptions of the inner senses are themselves action, and as such they change both the perceiver and the thing perceived. You can see then that even this astral image is always in motion and never static, and its condition alters the physical self even as the physical self acts upon the astral image.
quotes.translation: 现在，请将内在感官与行动及电磁实相的本质联系起来看待，因为内在感官的感知本身就是行动，因此它们既改变了感知者，也改变了被感知之物。由此可见，即使这个星光体影像也始终处于变动中而绝非静止，其状态会改变物质自我，正如物质自我作用于星光体影像一般。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You could see a phosphorescentlike glow, the aura of electromagnetic "structures" that compose the molecules themselves. You could, if you wished, condense your consciousness until it was small enough to travel through a single molecule, and from the molecule's own world look out and survey the universe of the room and the gigantic galaxy of interrelated, ever-moving starlike shapes. Now all of these possibilities represent a legitimate reality. Yours is no more legitimate than any other, but it is the only one that you perceive.
quotes.translation: 你们能看见一种磷光般的光晕，那是构成分子本身的电磁"结构"的光环。如果愿意，你们可以将意识浓缩到足够微小，以便穿越单个分子，从分子自身的世界向外眺望，审视房间的宇宙，以及由相互关联、永不停歇的星状形体构成的巨大星系。所有这些可能性都代表了一种合理的实相。你们的实相并不比其他任何实相更合理，但它是你们唯一能感知的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It was easier for me to make certain realignments and adjustments of a necessary nature. The other point that I wanted to make was that while your physical time, or clock time, has no overall basic reality, and is not a primary reality, that runs through various fields or systems, it is nevertheless an electromagnetic reality within your own system, for you have created it on mental terms.
quotes.translation: 我更容易做出某些必要的重新调整和修正。我想提出的另一点是：虽然你们的物理时间或钟表时间没有根本性的基本实相，也不是贯穿各个场域或系统的主要实相，但在你们自己的系统内，它确实是一种电磁实相，因为你们是根据心智条件创造它的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I have told you that exterior reality is a materialization of inner electromagnetic reality. I have told you that all experience is electromagnetically coded. The inner senses pick up this data directly, you see, as in last Friday's episode. Some translation must occur if you are to become aware consciously of such material, or if it is to impress the physical senses at all.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你们，外在实相是内在电磁实相的物质化。我曾告诉过你们，所有经验都以电磁方式编码。内在感官直接接收这些数据，你们看，就像上周五的片段那样。如果你们要有意识地觉察这类资料，或者要让这些资料对物质感官产生印象，就必须进行某种翻译。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The resulting thoughts and images in turn are expressed and affect others, and not only symbolically. As you should know, mental acts have an electromagnetic reality which directly affects the inner self, which directly forms the constantly changing nature of the inner self. For the inner self is, after all, composed of mental actions, and the entity itself is ever-changing.
quotes.translation: 由此产生的思想和影像反过来不仅以象征方式表达并影响他人。如你所知，心智活动具有电磁实相，直接影响内在自体，并直接塑造内在自体不断变化的本质。毕竟内在自体由心智行动构成，而存有本身也在持续变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The evening hours are best, and it was for this reason that I chose them. By this hour there is apt to be a stability of electromagnetic properties, though of course this is not always the case. Since all things have an electrical and chemical reality, the food that you eat is also important, and it is for this reason that I made certain suggestions concerning your diet.
quotes.translation: 傍晚时分最为理想，我选择这个时段正是基于此因。此时电磁属性往往趋于稳定，尽管并非总是如此。由于万物皆具电性与化学实相，你所摄入的食物同样重要，正因如此我才对你的饮食提出某些建议。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: No physical matter is without this electromagnetic reality, and no thought exists which does not exist within this reality. Again, I am not speaking symbolically, but quite practically. Emotions, having their own reality within this system, do not affect physical matter indirectly, but cause specific electromagnetic changes within the physical organism.
quotes.translation: 没有任何物质实体缺乏这种电磁实相，也没有任何思想能脱离此实相而存在。我再次强调，这并非象征性说法，而是非常实际的情况。情绪在此系统中拥有自身实相，不仅间接影响物质形体，更会在生理有机体内引发特定的电磁变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is not a simple question that may be summed up in a statement, such as "attitudes regulate behavior." What is not understood is that emotional attitudes, conscious and subconscious, have an electromagnetic reality that operates very efficiently, either as an open system which attracts new stimuli, or as a closed electric force that is supercharged.
quotes.translation: 这不是一个可以用“态度调节行为”这样的陈述简单概括的问题。人们尚未理解的是，有意识与无意识的情感态度具有一种电磁实相，它运作得极为高效——要么作为吸引新刺激的开放系统，要么作为被强化的封闭电力场。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We were discussing the nature of perception some while back, and its relation to clairvoyant activities. We were discussing the fact that no knowledge exists apart from consciousness. I told you that any perception alters the perceiver. Not only mentally and emotionally but also alters the electromagnetic reality of the internal physical structure.
quotes.translation: 我们之前讨论过感知的本质及其与天眼通活动的关系。我曾告诉你们，任何知识都无法脱离意识而存在。任何感知都会改变感知者——不仅改变其心智与情感，更会改变内在物理结构的电磁实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The brain organizes activity and translates events, but it does not initiate them. Events have an electromagnetic reality that is then projected onto the brain for physical activation. Your instruments only pick up certain levels of the brain's activity. They do not perceive the mind's activity at all, except as it is imprinted onto the brain.
quotes.translation: 大脑组织活动并转译事件，但并非事件的发起者。事件具有电磁实相，这种实相被投射到大脑上以启动物理层面的运作。你们的仪器只能捕捉到大脑活动的某些层次，完全无法感知心智的活动——除非它已铭印在大脑上。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: The psychological feeling of intensity has its own electromagnetic reality. An action is an experienced intensity, and need not involve motion in physical terms. As I have said, every action is a part of every other action, and affects every other action, and is also so affected itself. This is not however your cause and effect theory at all.
quotes.translation: 强度的心理感受有其自身的电磁实相。行动是一种被体验的强度，无需涉及物质层面的运动。如我所言，每个行动都是其他行动的一部分，影响其他行动，同时也被其他行动所影响。但这绝非你们所谓的因果理论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The entire act has its own electromagnetic reality, and the event is actually electromagnetic motion. The movement within the atoms mentioned earlier therefore is a part, basically, of the entire perceived event. Does this make the issue plainer for you?
quotes.translation: 整个行动有其自身的电磁实相，而事件实际上是电磁运动。因此，先前提到的原子内部运动，基本上是整个被感知事件的一部分。这样是否让这个问题对你而言更清晰了？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The projected form does make some impression upon your physical system. In other words, it is possible for it to be detected. It is a kind of pseudo image, materialistically speaking, but it has definite electromagnetic reality, and chemical properties.
quotes.translation: 投射的形相确实会在你们的物质系统上留下某种印象。换言之，它有可能被侦测到。从物质主义的角度来说，它是一种伪影像，但具有明确的电磁实相与化学特性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I mentioned earlier the connection between excess chemicals and the dream field. Now. Before we take a break, let me tell you that hormones within the physical body have not only a chemical but an electric, rather electromagnetic, basis and reality, and that these also are connectors with other fields of existence.
quotes.translation: 我先前提到过过剩化学物质与梦境场域之间的关联。现在，在我们休息之前，让我告诉你，肉体之内的荷尔蒙不仅具有化学基础与实相，还具有电性——更确切地说是电磁性——的基础与实相，而这些也是与其他存在场域相连的媒介。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The past exists as a series of electromagnetic connections, held in the physical brain on the one hand, but it also consists of the same sort of realities retained in the nonphysical mind. These electromagnetic connections can be changed. The present exists as a series of electromagnetic connections in both the brain and the mind, and this is the only reality which you are justified in giving to your present.
quotes.translation: 过去以一连串电磁连接的形式存在，一方面被保存在物质大脑中，但同时也由保留在非物质心智中的同类实相所构成。这些电磁连接是可以改变的。当下以一连串电磁连接的形式存在于大脑与心智中，而这是你唯一有理由赋予你当下的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Electromagnetic reality belongs to the inner self. It is not a property that belongs to physical matter, although it does appear in physical terms. （Pause.） The second and third projection forms have electromagnetic realities. （Pause.） We are going slow here to get this material through clearly.
quotes.translation: 电磁实相属于内在自体。它并非物质实体的属性，尽管它确实以物质形式显现。（停顿）第二和第三投射形态具有电磁实相。（停顿）我们在此放慢速度，以确保这些资料清晰传达。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now. Each thought forms its own electromagnetic reality, and is composed of energy which can never be dissipated, but only transformed.
quotes.translation: 现在。每个念头都形成其自身的电磁实相，并由永不消散、只能转化的能量所组成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I have mentioned that any action has an electromagnetic reality, and so thoughts and dreams as well form this identity system.
quotes.translation: 我曾提过，任何行动都具有电磁实相，因此念头与梦境同样构成这个身份系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json
